basic_details.job_title: IIT Goa Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Goa (IIT Goa) Project Associate-I Notification 2026 has been released on [Release Date] on the official website [official website]. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Goa Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a B.Tech./B.E. or M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Manufacturing/Production/Materials engineering, along with a Qualified GATE SCORE, are eligible to apply for this Project Associate-I vacancy. The online application process for IIT Goa Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 26-05-2026. Cand

qualification.details: Project Associate-I: Essential: B.Tech./B.E. or M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Manufacturing/Production/Materials engineering with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60%. Must have a Qualified GATE SCORE in relevant streams. Desirable: Experience in prototype development, machining, and vibration analysis.

selection_process: Screening by selection committee Selection process (may be online)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Goa to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Goa Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Goa is 26th May 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech./B.E. or M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Manufacturing/Production/Materials engineering with a minimum of 6.5 CGPA or 60%, and a valid GATE SCORE in relevant streams.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 37,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Associate-I position at IIT Goa.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted online through the official website of IIT Goa.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Project Associate-I is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an initial screening by a selection committee, followed by a selection process which may be conducted online.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page or via the official website of IIT Goa.

faq.question: Q10. Does IIT Goa offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for details regarding age relaxation for reserved categories, as this information is not explicitly provided in the summary.
